## Summary
Systematic vol selling compresses realized volatility until positioning unwinds in a gap. The August 2024 VIX spike showed how quickly short-gamma books reprice.

## Key Points
- Record inflows into vol-selling ETFs and 0DTE strategies rebuilt crowding after 2024.
- Dealer gamma hedging pins vol in calm tapes but amplifies moves when spot gaps.
- Tail hedges are cheap relative to positioning extremes heading into 2025.
